chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. S-313 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to non-prosecution of main case 15.9.2025 None present for the petitioners -------------------------------- This petition was fixed on 01.9.2025, when none was bothered to appear on behalf of the petitioners, however, due to urgency shown in the memo of petition, this Court ordered for issuance of notice. Today, nobody is interested to put their point of view to assist this Court. As such, this Court is left with no option, but to dismiss this lis on account of non-prosecution due to lack of interest of the petitioners. This petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Zahid/*
